features: FAST RELIEF: Masterplast Heat Massaging Spray provides instant relief for mild to moderate pain. Easy and ready to use, use the heat massaging spray relieves rheumatic pain, muscular aches and strains
WARMING: Effective, warming relief to the affected areas. Use directly after exercise if required
INNOVATIVE: Specially formulated to provide the healing properties of heat therapy, quickly and instantly, ideal to keep in a gym, sports or football kit bag

READY TO USE: Easy to apply a direct burst of warm relief to a specific area. The spray can be used immediately after exercise. Apply as often as required. Wash hands after use. For external use only. Do not use on broken or irritated skin
description: Product Description Masterplast Heat Massaging Spray provides instant relief for mild to moderate pain. Easy and ready to use, use the heat massaging spray relieves rheumatic pain, muscular aches and strains. Provides instant relief for mild to moderate pain. Easy to apply a direct burst of warm relief to a specific area. The spray can be used immediately after exercise. Apply as often as required. Wash hands after use. For external use only. Do not use on broken or irritated skin. 150ml Spray Directions 1. Shake the bottle before use. 2. Spray a moderate amount on the affected area. 3. Gently massage the area until completely absorbed. 4. Repeat if necessary. Safety Warning May cause skin irritation or discomfort. Avoid contact with eyes and mouth. Do not inhale. Use only as directed. See more
